prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 6788→8377→10442→6735→7839，近 5 年波动较大，2023 年曾后移至 10442 名，2024 年反弹至 6735 名，2025 年回落至 7839 名，整体呈震荡格局；2025 年基准约 7839 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 285 人，2023 年 276 人，2024 年 268 人，2025 年 271 人；2026 年计划 272 人，较 2025 年微增 1 人，扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 26 名，近年排名稳定在第 24–27 名区间，属全国顶尖综合性大学；2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及校园安全事件（浴池翻筐等）及学术不端舆情，可能对部分考生报考心理产生抑制作用；抖音热度排名第 40 位（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度；2025 年投档异常信号为「中关注」，江苏物理类及黑龙江临床组出现位次下降；马克思主义理论 A+、考古学 A+、化学 A、法学 A、数学 A、物理学 A、机械工程 A、兽医学 A、计算机科学与技术 A-、电子科学与技术 A-、材料科学与工程 A-、生物学 A-、哲学 A-、政治学 A-、工商管理 A- 等 15 个 A-/A/A+ 学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业持续高热推荐，与吉林大学优势学科高度 匹配；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数 154000 人，较 2025 年历史类+物理类合计 116360 人增长约 32%，按近年比例估算物理类约 114000 人，较 2025 年 83716 人增幅约 36%，竞争显著加剧；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，在内蒙古自治区招生占比约 0.8%–1.0%（2025 年物理类 271 人占全国总招生约 3 万余人），属跨省招生，无本地偏好优势；东北地区高校在内蒙古考生中认可度一般，地域因素对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次震荡走势、2026 年招生计划基本持平、本省考生规模大幅增加约 36% 以及学校负面声誉对报考意愿的潜在抑制，在 2025 年基准 7839 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 7906 名，区间 7406–8406 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 7406–8406 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<7406 名）可重点冲击临床医学 5+3、口腔医学 5+3、计算机等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>8406 名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入吉林大学平台后再通过转专业或辅修提升竞争力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (including Science) minimum rankings approximately 6788→8377→10442→6735→7839, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years; in 2023 it shifted back to 10442, rebounded to 6735 in 2024, and fell back to 7839 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating pattern; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7839; local Physics Category enrollment plans were 285 in 2021–2022, 276 in 2023, 268 in 2024, and 271 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 272, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, with minimal expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 26th in 2026, stable in the 24–27 range in recent years, a top national comprehensive university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (bathroom basket theft, etc.) and academic misconduct rumors, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking 40th (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms; the 2025 abnormal admission signal is 'medium concern', with ranking drops in Jiangsu Physics Category and Heilongjiang Clinical Medicine group; 15 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Chemistry A, Law A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Business Administration A-, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting candidates to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine and other majors remain highly recommended, closely matching Jilin University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 local general college entrance examination is 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to the 2025 total of 116,360 (History + Physics categories); estimated Physics Category candidates about 114,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 36% from 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, with enrollment in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region accounting for about 0.8%–1.0% (271 Physics Category students in 2025 out of a total national enrollment of about 30,000+), making it cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference advantage; universities in Northeast China have average recognition among Inner Mongolia candidates, with regional factors having a neutral impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the oscillating trend of historical rankings, the basically unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 36% in local candidate numbers, and the potential suppression of application willingness due to negative reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 7839; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7906, with a range of 7406–8406.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7406–8406, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<7406), focus on top majors like Clinical Medicine 5+3, Stomatology 5+3, and Computer Science; for rankings near the upper limit (>8406), prioritize Tier 3 majors to secure admission to Jilin University and then improve competitiveness through major transfer or minor programs.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2477→2400→1162→3611→964. Over the past 5 years, fluctuations have been severe: a significant forward shift to 1162 in 2023, a major backward shift to 3611 in 2024, and a rebound to 964 in 2025, with no clear single-direction trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 964. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 47 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 47, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 26th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top-tier comprehensive university nationwide with a strong liberal arts foundation. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with a certain level of attention. Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Law A, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Business Administration A-; the liberal arts advantage disciplines are outstanding, with Law being one of the Five Institutes and Four Departments, and Archaeology being top in the country.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of provincial general college entrance exam takers is 154,000, with an estimated 40,000 in History Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 23% from 32,644 in 2025, intensifying competition. Jilin University's History Category enrollment in Inner Mongolia is extremely small (about 0.1%–0.2%), a cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference advantage. Universities in Northeast China have average recognition among liberal arts candidates in Inner Mongolia.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 23% increase in provincial History Category candidates, and the negative reputation impact, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 964. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 994, with a range of 852–1136.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 852–1136, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<852), you can focus on top majors like Law and Kuang Yaming Class. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>1136), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, leveraging Jilin University's platform advantages for future development.
